mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, USE_YN, TERM_TYPE, TERM_COUNT FROM TEACH_SETTING WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TEACH_SETTING a USING dual ON (a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.USE_YN = #{use_yn}, a.TERM_TYPE = #{term_type}, a.TERM_COUNT = #{term_count} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, use_yn, term_type, term_count ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{use_yn}, #{term_type}, #{term_count} )
